source.name: Congress.gov
source.description: Official U.S. legislative records and roll-call votes via api.congress.gov

meta.note: House roll-call votes from Congress.gov API v3 when CONGRESS_API_KEY is set. Senate roll-call votes from official senate.gov LIS XML (no key). Governors and profiles without bioguideId show honest missing-data labels.
